info.name: WebSphere Liberty REST Connector API
info.description:
Secure REST-based JMX connector for remote administration of Liberty servers. Provides file transfer and JMX MBean access through HTTPS endpoints, requiring TLS for confidential communication. Supports MBean operations, attribute access, and notification subscriptions.

Contact Support:
 Name: IBM Support
